nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Apo sunbird
nodes.summary: Apo sunbird（Apo sunbird，学名 Aethopyga boltoni），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于國際自然保護聯盟，常见栖息地包括山地森林、开阔山地。

nodes.name: 开阔山地
nodes.summary: 地形开阔且便于大翼展鸟类活动的山地区域。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 國際自然保護聯盟
nodes.summary: 國際自然保護聯盟是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联43种鸟类，包括绿翅雁、Stubble quail、菲律賓鴉鵑等43种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It can be found in mountainous areas in the western and central parts of the island, specifically Mount Apo, Mount Kitanglad, and Mount Malindang. Its natural habitat is in montane rainforest ranging in altitude from . The IUCN has classified the species as Least Concern but formerly listed it as near threatened. Despite its limited range, it is said to be locally common

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in tropical moist montane forests at elevations ranging from above sea level
